BriefDescription: Read CAS command sent to DRAM (including Read CAS with auto precharge)
Write CAS command sent to DRAM (including Write CAS with auto precharge)
This counter counts number of bytes read, in 32B chunk, per DDR channel. Counter increments by 1 after receiving 32B chunk data. Note this includes data from mode register accesses

Total number of read and write byte transfers to/from DRAM, in 32B chunk, per DDR channel. Counter increments by 1 after sending or receiving 32B chunk data. Note this includes data from mode register accesses. Does not support channel masking
This counter counts number of bytes written, in 32B chunk, per DDR channel. Counter increments by 1 after sending 32B chunk data.
